footer.description: SmartStay connects rental discovery with day-to-day operations, from public listings and applications to contracts, payments, and resident service after move-in.

company.discovery: Browse by area, district, and property type

hero.eyebrow: A rental platform built for the full journey
hero.title: Find your next home. Or manage hundreds.
hero.description: SmartStay connects renters and operators inside one product ecosystem, where listings, applications, contracts, payments, and operations stay in sync.
hero.panelTitle: Built around what both sides actually need.
hero.panelDescription: Renters browse like they are in a premium marketplace. Owners operate revenue, contracts, staff, and service inside the same system.
hero.keywordPlaceholder: For example: West Lake, studio with balcony...
hero.marketCardLine1: Filter by price, area, and amenities
hero.marketCardLine2: Book visits or submit an application
hero.marketCardLine3: Track payments and service after move-in
hero.opsCardDescription: One sign-in flow that routes every user to the right workspace based on role and tenant stage.

discovery.title: Public listings presented like a real product surface.
discovery.description: This is not a fake marketing grid. It is the real front door into SmartStay's discovery and rental application flow.
discovery.fallbackTitle: Showing curated examples while live listing data is unavailable.
discovery.fallbackDescription: As soon as public listing data is available, this section will switch back to real inventory automatically.
discovery.liveTitle: These cards are powered by the live public listings feed.
discovery.liveDescription: Renters can move directly into the full listing experience to keep filtering, comparing, and applying.

renterFeatures.title: Discover, apply, move in, and live inside one continuous journey.
renterFeatures.description: Renters should not just see a beautiful landing page. They should understand the full path from finding a home to living there.
renterFeatures.browseDescription: Filter by budget, room type, location, and availability to narrow down the right fit quickly.
renterFeatures.visitDescription: Move from browsing to real-world action without jumping into disconnected tools.
renterFeatures.applyDescription: Start verification and application in the context of the room the renter actually selected.
renterFeatures.payDescription: Track contracts, invoices, and payment history after becoming an active resident.
renterFeatures.maintenanceDescription: The resident portal keeps renters connected to operations for maintenance, support, and service during the lease.

ownerFeatures.title: From one building to an entire portfolio, everything lives in a single operating center.
ownerFeatures.description: SmartStay acts as both a demand-generation surface and an operational system for revenue, contracts, and service.
ownerFeatures.calloutTitle: Connect demand, contracts, billing, and teams in one system.
ownerFeatures.calloutDescription: No more stitching together CRM tools, spreadsheets, and a resident app. SmartStay keeps the full rental operation inside one product.
ownerFeatures.dashboardDescription: Track occupancy, receivables, revenue, and operating signals by building or across the portfolio.
ownerFeatures.tenantDescription: Manage resident profiles, onboarding state, contracts, and addendums from one source of truth.
ownerFeatures.billingDescription: Automate billing cycles, reminders, and payment tracking without fragmented manual workflows.
ownerFeatures.opsDescription: Assign work, process requests, and track SLA risk inside a structured command center.
ownerFeatures.analyticsDescription: Read revenue performance, occupancy, and growth trends in real time for faster decisions.

flow.title: Discover → Apply → Move in → Live → Managed seamlessly
flow.description: SmartStay does not split marketing from product. Each step in the lifecycle has a clear place inside the same ecosystem.
flow.discoverDescription: Renters explore rooms that match budget, area, and amenities.
flow.applyDescription: Verification and rental application begin inside the selected listing flow.
flow.moveInDescription: Contracting and resident activation happen with clear operational control.
flow.liveDescription: The resident portal handles payments, notices, and service requests.
flow.manageDescription: Operators track revenue, work, and portfolio health from one workspace.

productPreview.title: One product, two distinct surfaces: marketplace outside and command center inside.
productPreview.description: Renters should see a high-quality discovery experience. Operators should see a sharp, trustworthy workspace.
productPreview.marketplaceTitle: Listing discovery should feel like a premium consumer product.
productPreview.marketplaceDescription: The design prioritizes clarity, desirability, and fast action.
productPreview.opsTitle: A focused operating dashboard for rental portfolios.

testimonials.title: A platform credible enough for renters to choose and for operators to run every day.
testimonials.description: Social proof should reflect SmartStay's dual-sided structure: conversion on the outside and operating leverage on the inside.
testimonials.renterQuote: I could browse rooms, compare prices, and apply in one very clear flow. After moving in, invoices and support requests stayed inside the same account.
testimonials.ownerQuote: SmartStay gives my team visibility across both demand and back-office operations. That cuts a huge amount of friction between marketing, contracts, and ticket handling.

pricing.title: Renters use SmartStay for free. Operators pay for scale and operational value.
pricing.description: The pricing section is framed around operational outcomes, while making it clear that renters never pay platform fees.
pricing.freeNote: Best for learning the workflow and testing the public listings path.
pricing.proNote: For operators managing multiple assets who need billing, tickets, and reporting.
pricing.enterpriseNote: For larger portfolios that require advanced approvals, operating controls, and guided rollout.
pricing.footnote: Renters can always browse listings and use the resident portal after activation without paying platform fees.

faq.title: What renters and operators usually ask before they get started.
faq.description: These questions help the landing page communicate the product clearly, not just list features.
faq.question1: Is SmartStay a marketplace or a building management platform?
faq.answer1: Both. Renters begin in public listings, while operators use the same ecosystem to manage contracts, invoices, tickets, and the resident portal.
faq.question2: Do renters need an account before browsing rooms?
faq.answer2: No. Browsing stays public. An account is only required when a renter is ready to apply or continue into the resident experience later.
faq.question3: Does the owner path create a real account today?
faq.answer3: Not in this phase. The owner signup flow works as a polished onboarding and handoff experience until full backend provisioning is introduced.

finalCta.title: Rent smarter, or operate with more confidence.
finalCta.description: Whether you are looking for your next home or running a rental portfolio, SmartStay gives you a clear entry point.

hero.title: Find your next home effortlessly
hero.description: Browse thousands of verified listings or run your rental portfolio inside the same SmartStay ecosystem.
hero.searchHint: The primary search has been moved into the header so users can filter by location, property type, and price without extra navigation layers.

search.locationPlaceholder: For example: West Lake, District 7, apartment near metro...

categories.title: Start with the format that fits your need
categories.explore: Jump into verified inventory with a cleaner, more focused discovery experience.

featured.title: High-intent inventory worth opening first
featured.description: The listing card is treated like a real marketplace product surface: strong media, clear pricing, location, and quality signals.

latest.title: Fresh supply for renters who need to move quickly
latest.description: A denser card grid helps users scan more options without dropping into clutter.

locations.title: Explore the strongest supply clusters by market
locations.description: From Ho Chi Minh City to Hanoi, SmartStay highlights the cities with the most active rental demand.

districts.title: Go deeper into the districts renters search most
districts.description: Jump straight into the district you care about instead of rebuilding filters every time.

projects.title: A dedicated layer for notable buildings and collections
projects.description: Show buildings as a collection so renters and operators can both understand how supply is structured.

guides.title: Content that supports decisions, SEO, and product trust
guides.description: SmartStay is not only a place to browse inventory. It is also a content surface that helps renters understand the market.
guides.card1Title: 5 things to check before placing a deposit in central districts
guides.card1Description: A fast checklist for rent level, contract terms, service fees, and day-to-day fit.
guides.card2Title: How to compare rooms, mini apartments, and 1-bedroom units
guides.card2Description: A practical guide to choosing the right living format for budget and lifestyle.
guides.card3Title: How rental demand is shifting across districts
guides.card3Description: A market-insight angle that helps renters choose location better and helps operators see growth areas.

owner.title: Manage your rental portfolio with more speed and more control
owner.description: SmartStay does not just drive renter demand on the outside. It also pulls tenants, contracts, billing, and daily operations into one workspace.
owner.featureTenantDescription: Track onboarding, resident records, and contract progress from one source of truth.
owner.featureBillingDescription: Automate invoice cycles, reminders, and payment status across multiple buildings.
owner.featureAnalyticsDescription: Monitor occupancy, revenue, and operating bottlenecks in real time.

finalCta.eyebrow: Move forward from the right side
finalCta.title: Find faster or operate smarter with one connected platform
finalCta.description: Whether you are renting your next place or running an entire portfolio, SmartStay gives you a clear entry point with a consistent experience.

login.lockedToast: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in 5 minutes.
login.passwordLengthToast: Password must be at least 6 characters.
login.ownerTitle: Sign in to return to your operating workspace.
login.renterTitle: Sign in to continue your rental and resident journey.
login.defaultTitle: One sign-in gateway for all of SmartStay.
login.ownerDescription: From operations dashboards to billing, staff, and reporting, SmartStay keeps operator workflows behind a single secure access point.
login.renterDescription: From applications to the resident portal, SmartStay keeps renters in one consistent journey once the account is active.
login.defaultDescription: No need to choose a separate owner, staff, or tenant portal. SmartStay identifies the role and routes every user to the correct workspace.
login.autoRoutingDescription: After authentication, SmartStay automatically routes users to the right owner, staff, super admin, or tenant destination.
login.sharedAccessDescription: Landing, marketplace, resident portal, and internal operations still belong to the same product system rather than disconnected tools.
login.sideQuote: A good login page does more than secure access. It should also make users feel they are entering the right product surface.
login.formTitle: Continue through the right entry point
login.formDescription: This shared login works for renters, owners, staff, and super admins. The destination logic remains unchanged.
login.socialDescription: This space is intentionally designed for future OAuth providers, but it is not enabled in this phase.

register.heroTitle: Start from the path that matches your goal.
register.heroDescription: Renters and operators should not enter through the same message. SmartStay separates those starting points while keeping one product language.
register.renterCardDescription: Browse listings, apply online, and continue into the resident portal after move-in.
register.ownerCardDescription: Share operating needs, portfolio shape, and start the handoff toward an operator setup.
register.sideQuote: Signup is not just a form. It is where the product quickly explains whether someone is entering the renter or operator branch.
register.chooseTitle: How are you coming into SmartStay?
register.chooseDescription: We use this choice to put each user into the right onboarding path instead of forcing both audiences through the same form.

renter.title: Create a renter account
renter.description: For prospects or tenants who want to save discovery, apply for rooms, and later continue into the resident portal.
renter.agreeTerms: I agree to SmartStay's terms of service and privacy policy.
renter.emailConfirmToast: Please verify your email before signing in.
renter.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

owner.title: Register operator setup interest
owner.description: This path collects implementation details for owners and property managers. A real operating account will be handled in the next handoff step.
owner.successToast: Your setup request has been recorded.
owner.successTitle: The SmartStay team has received your request.
owner.successDescription: We will use this information to prepare the right rollout path for your operating model and portfolio size.
